steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva based on provided data
from math import isclose

# Given values (Último = 2025-03-31)
ativo_total = 54578563000.0
ativo_circulante = 10834561000.0
caixa = 3636011000.0
aplicacoes = 1129795000.0
estoques = 920878000.0
tributos_rec = 234710000.0
outros_ativos_circ = 2834296000.0

passivo_circulante = 7099452000.0
fornecedores = 1529752000.0
emp_curto = 1553297000.0
outras_obrigacoes_circ = 3642692000.0

passivo_nao_circ = 26951632000.0
emp_longo = 17648717000.0
outras_obrigacoes_nc = 7770017000.0
provision_nc = 1228324000.0

patrim_liq_parent = 19137726000.0  # Patrimônio Líquido - Saldos Finais (parent)
patrim_liq_consolidado = 20527479000.0

# Income statement quarterly values (Q1 2025 = ÚLTIMO, Q1 2024 = PENÚLTIMO)
rev_q1_2025 = 4423556000.0
rev_q1_2024 = 2004692000.0

cogs_q1_2025 = -3102001000.0
cogs_q1_2024 = -1045621000.0
res_bruto_q1_2025 = 1321555000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 959071000.0

ebit_q1_2025 = 972874000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 740268000.0

fin_q1_2025 = -253297000.0
fin_q1_2024 = -707078000.0

res_before_tax_q1_2025 = 719577000.0
res_before_tax_q1_2024 = 33190000.0

ir_q1_2025 = -250718000.0
ir_q1_2024 = 33513000.0

net_q1_2025 = 468859000.0
net_q1_2024 = 66703000.0

net_parent_q1_2025 = 384385000.0
net_parent_q1_2024 = -60894000.0

# Annual (2024) values from previous dataset
rev_2024 = 14338633000.0
res_bruto_2024 = 3953483000.0
ebit_2024 = 2211909000.0
net_2024 = 549472000.0
net_parent_2024 = 42013000.0

dep_amort_2024 = -1689626000.0  # negative in report

dep_amort_q1_2025 = -554882000.0

dep_amort_q1_2024 = -348781000.0

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 1932592000
treasury = 1202000
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - treasury
price = 13.53

# Calculations
# Disponibilidades: caixa + aplicacoes (assumption)
disponibilidades = caixa + aplicacoes

# Dívida bruta: sum of short and long loans/financ and (no explicit debentures provided)
div_bruta = emp_curto + emp_longo

# Dívida líquida = dívida bruta - disponibilidades
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# LTM (12 months) calculations: 2024 annual + Q1 2025 - Q1 2024
rev_ltm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ltm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ltm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
net_parent_ltm = net_parent_2024 + net_parent_q1_2025 - net_parent_q1_2024

# 3 months (quarter) = difference between Q1 2025 and Q1 2024 (year-over-year quarter change as proxy)
rev_q_3m = rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_q_3m = ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_q_3m = net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024

# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# per-share metrics
lpa = net_parent_ltm / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrim_liq_parent / shares_outstanding

# P ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else float('inf')
ppv = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else float('inf')

# P/EBIT = price / (EBIT per share)
ebit_per_share = ebit_ltm / shares_outstanding
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# PSR price / revenue per shareev_per_share = rev_ltm / shares_outstanding
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# P/Ativos = price / (ativos per share)
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share if ativos_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# Capital de giro
giro_capital = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = giro_capital / shares_outstanding
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# Ativo circulante líquido = ativo circulante - estoques
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - estoques
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# EV calculations: EV = market_cap + dívida líquida
enterprise_value = market_cap + div_liquida

# Depreciação/amortização LTM (absolute values)
dep_amort_ltm = dep_amort_2024 + dep_amort_q1_2025 - dep_amort_q1_2024
# Note: dep entries are negative in report; take absolute when adding to EBIT for EBITDA
# Since dep_amort_2024 is negative, dep_amort_ltm will be negative; EBITDA = EBIT LTM - dep_amort_ltm (because dep_amort negative)

ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm - dep_amort_ltm  # because dep_amort_ltm negative, subtracting negative adds

# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm != 0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm != 0 else float('inf')

# P/Ativos already computed as p_ativos

# Margins
# LTM gross profit
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ltm / ativo_total) * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - disponibilidades
roic = (ebit_ltm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom != 0 else None

# ROE = Lucro Líquido (parent LTM) / Patrimônio Líq (parent)
roe = (net_parent_ltm / patrim_liq_parent) * 100 if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = ativo circulante líquido / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = (ativ_circ_liq / passivo_circulante) if passivo_circulante != 0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrim_liq_parent if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = receita líquida LTM / total ativo
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total

# Prepare outputs, round appropriately
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

def r(x, nd=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    if x == float('inf'):
        return None
    return float(Decimal(x).quantize(Decimal('1.' + '0'*nd), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP))

results = {
    'Ativo': r(ativo_total, 2),
    'Disponibilidades': r(disponibilidades, 2),
    'Ativo Circulante': r(ativo_circulante,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': r(div_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': r(div_liquida,2),
    'Patrim. Líq': r(patrim_liq_parent,2),
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': r(rev_ltm,2),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': r(ebit_ltm,2),
    'Lucro Lquido (12 meses)': r(net_ltm,2),
    'Receita Líquida (3 meses)': r(rev_q_3m,2),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': r(ebit_q_3m,2),
    'Lucro Lquido (3 meses)': r(net_q_3m,2),
    'P/L': r(pl,2),
    'P/VP': r(ppv,2),
    'P/EBIT': r(p_ebit,2),
    'PSR': r(psr,2),
    'P/Ativos': r(p_ativos,2),
    'P/Cap. Giro': r(p_cap_giro,2),
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': r(p_ativ_circ_liq,2),
    'EV / EBITDA': r(ev_ebitda,2),
    'EV / EBIT': r(ev_ebit,2),
    'LPA': r(lpa,6),
    'VPA': r(vpa,6),
    'Marg. Bruta': r(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT': r(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. Líquida': r(marg_liq,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo': r(ebit_over_ativo,2),
    'ROIC': r(roic,2),
    'ROE': r(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': r(liquidez_corr,2),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': r(divbr_patrim,2),
    'Giro Ativos': r(giro_ativos,4)
}

# Print results in expected structure
print(results)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

res_before_tax_q1_2024 = 33190000.0

ir_q1_2025 = -250718000.0
ir_q1_2024 = 33513000.0

net_q1_2024 = 66703000.0

net_parent_q1_2024 = -60894000.0

ebit_2024 = 2211909000.0
net_2024 = 549472000.0
net_parent_2024 = 42013000.0

dep_amort_q1_2025 = -554882000.0

dep_amort_q1_2024 = -348781000.0

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 1932592000
treasury = 1202000
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - treasury
price = 13.53

# Calculations
# Disponibilidades: caixa + aplicacoes (assumption)
disponibilidades = caixa + aplicacoes

# Dívida bruta: sum of short and long loans/financ
div_bruta = emp_curto + emp_longo

# Dívida líquida = dívida bruta - disponibilidades
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# LTM (12 months) calculations: 2024 annual + Q1 2025 - Q1 2024
rev_ltm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ltm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ltm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
net_parent_ltm = net_parent_2024 + net_parent_q1_2025 - net_parent_q1_2024

# 3 months (quarter) = difference between Q1 2025 and Q1 2024 (year-over-year quarter change as proxy)
rev_q_3m = rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024

# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# per-share metrics
lpa = net_parent_ltm / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrim_liq_parent / shares_outstanding

# P ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else float('inf')
ppv = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else float('inf')

# P/EBIT = price / (EBIT per share)
ebit_per_share = ebit_ltm / shares_outstanding
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# PSR price / revenue per share
rev_per_share = rev_ltm / shares_outstanding
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# P/Ativos = price / (ativos per share)
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share if ativos_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# Capital de giro
giro_capital = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = giro_capital / shares_outstanding
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# Ativo circulante líquido = ativo circulante - estoques
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - estoques
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share != 0 else float('inf')

# EV calculations: EV = market_cap + dívida líquida
enterprise_value = market_cap + div_liquida

# Depreciação/amortização LTM (absolute values)
dep_amort_ltm = dep_amort_2024 + dep_amort_q1_2025 - dep_amort_q1_2024
# EBITDA = EBIT LTM - (dep_amort_ltm) because dep_amort entries are negative in report
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm - dep_amort_ltm

# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm != 0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm != 0 else float('inf')

# Margins
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ltm / ativo_total) * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - disponibilidades
roic = (ebit_ltm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom != 0 else None

# ROE = Lucro Líquido (parent LTM) / Patrimônio Líq (parent)
roe = (net_parent_ltm / patrim_liq_parent) * 100 if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = ativo circulante líquido / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = (ativ_circ_liq / passivo_circulante) if passivo_circulante != 0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrim_liq_parent if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = receita líquida LTM / total ativo
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total

# Rounding helpers
def r(x, nd=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    if x == float('inf'):
        return None
    return float(Decimal(x).quantize(Decimal('1.' + '0'*nd), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP))

results = [
    ('Ativo', r(ativo_total, 2)),
    ('Disponibilidades', r(disponibilidades, 2)),
    ('Ativo Circulante', r(ativo_circulante,2)),
    ('Dív. Bruta', r(div_bruta,2)),
    ('Dív. Líquida', r(div_liquida,2)),
    ('Patrim. Líq', r(patrim_liq_parent,2)),
    ('Receita Líquida (12 meses)', r(rev_ltm,2)),
    ('EBIT (12 meses)', r(ebit_ltm,2)),
    ('Lucro L�quido (12 meses)', r(net_ltm,2)),
    ('Receita Líquida (3 meses)', r(rev_q_3m,2)),
    ('EBIT (3 meses)', r(ebit_q_3m,2)),
    ('Lucro L�quido (3 meses)', r(net_q_3m,2)),
    ('P/L', r(pl,2)),
    ('P/VP', r(ppv,2)),
    ('P/EBIT', r(p_ebit,2)),
    ('PSR', r(psr,2)),
    ('P/Ativos', r(p_ativos,2)),
    ('P/Cap. Giro', r(p_cap_giro,2)),
    ('P/Ativ Circ Liq', r(p_ativ_circ_liq,2)),
    ('EV / EBITDA', r(ev_ebitda,2)),
    ('EV / EBIT', r(ev_ebit,2)),
    ('LPA', r(lpa,6)),
    ('VPA', r(vpa,6)),
    ('Marg. Bruta', r(marg_bruta,2)),
    ('Marg. EBIT', r(marg_ebit,2)),
    ('Marg. Líquida', r(marg_liq,2)),
    ('EBIT / Ativo', r(ebit_over_ativo,2)),
    ('ROIC', r(roic,2)),
    ('ROE', r(roe,2)),
    ('Liquidez Corr', r(liquidez_corr,2)),
    ('Div Br/ Patrim', r(divbr_patrim,2)),
    ('Giro Ativos', r(giro_ativos,4)),
]

print(results)
"} }

# Margins
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm != 0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ltm / ativo_total) * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - disponibilidades
roic = (ebit_ltm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom != 0 else None

# ROE = Lucro Líquido (parent LTM) / Patrimônio Líq (parent)
roe = (net_parent_ltm / patrim_liq_parent) * 100 if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = ativo circulante líquido / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = (ativ_circ_liq / passivo_circulante) if passivo_circulante != 0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrim_liq_parent if patrim_liq_parent != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = receita líquida LTM / total ativo
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total

# Rounding helpers
def r(x, nd=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    if x == float('inf'):
        return None
    return float(Decimal(x).quantize(Decimal('1.' + '0'*nd), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP))

results = [
    ('Ativo', r(ativo_total, 2)),
    ('Disponibilidades', r(disponibilidades, 2)),
    ('Ativo Circulante', r(ativo_circulante,2)),
    ('Dív. Bruta', r(div_bruta,2)),
    ('Dív. Líquida', r(div_liquida,2)),
    ('Patrim. Líq', r(patrim_liq_parent,2)),
    ('Receita Líquida (12 meses)', r(rev_ltm,2)),
    ('EBIT (12 meses)', r(ebit_ltm,2)),
    ('Lucro Líquido (12 meses)', r(net_ltm,2)),
    ('Receita Líquida (3 meses)', r(rev_q_3m,2)),
    ('EBIT (3 meses)', r(ebit_q_3m,2)),
    ('Lucro Líquido (3 meses)', r(net_q_3m,2)),
    ('P/L', r(pl,2)),
    ('P/VP', r(ppv,2)),
    ('P/EBIT', r(p_ebit,2)),
    ('PSR', r(psr,2)),
    ('P/Ativos', r(p_ativos,2)),
    ('P/Cap. Giro', r(p_cap_giro,2)),
    ('P/Ativ Circ Liq', r(p_ativ_circ_liq,2)),
    ('EV / EBITDA', r(ev_ebitda,2)),
    ('EV / EBIT', r(ev_ebit,2)),
    ('LPA', r(lpa,6)),
    ('VPA', r(vpa,6)),
    ('Marg. Bruta', r(marg_bruta,2)),
    ('Marg. EBIT', r(marg_ebit,2)),
    ('Marg. Líquida', r(marg_liq,2)),
    ('EBIT / Ativo', r(ebit_over_ativo,2)),
    ('ROIC', r(roic,2)),
    ('ROE', r(roe,2)),
    ('Liquidez Corr', r(liquidez_corr,2)),
    ('Div Br/ Patrim', r(divbr_patrim,2)),
    ('Giro Ativos', r(giro_ativos,4)),
]

for k,v in results:
    print(k, v)

results
"} }
